title: codonopsis macrophylla
intro: Codonopsis macrophylla, also known as Dong Ba Jiao or Big Flower Codonopsis, is a perennial plant species native to China and the Himalayas, belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Codonopsis macrophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or dried roots, making it a versatile ingredient for various herbal preparations.
